scripts.build:plugin: pnpm --filter @use-voltra/expo-plugin run build && pnpm --filter @use-voltra/ios-client run build:expo-plugin && pnpm --filter @use-voltra/android-client run build:expo-plugin
scripts.clean:plugin: pnpm --filter @use-voltra/expo-plugin run clean && pnpm --filter @use-voltra/ios-client run clean:expo-plugin && pnpm --filter @use-voltra/android-client run clean:expo-plugin
scripts.format:check: pnpm run format:js:check && pnpm --filter @use-voltra/android-client run format:check && pnpm --filter @use-voltra/ios-client run format:check
scripts.format:fix: pnpm run format:js:fix && pnpm --filter @use-voltra/android-client run format:fix && pnpm --filter @use-voltra/ios-client run format:fix
scripts.test:native: pnpm run test:kotlin && pnpm run test:swift
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:js && pnpm run test:native
scripts.test:kotlin:pre-push: git diff --quiet origin/main...HEAD -- packages/android-client || turbo run test:kotlin --filter=@use-voltra/android-client
scripts.test:swift:pre-push: git diff --quiet origin/main...HEAD -- packages/ios-client || turbo run test:swift --filter=@use-voltra/ios-client
